input.note:
Hi Jordan,

Maya Chen from Acme Health is asking about their Pro plan renewal pricing and whether their current discount will carry over. Their renewal is scheduled for 2026-08-30.

Per policy, renewal and discount questions for existing customers should be handled by the account owner. Please follow up with the appropriate renewal terms.

Thanks!
